kc:measurement.kc:description: ionization chamber calibrated by the NPL
ionization chamber calibrated by the NPL
ionization chamber calibrated in 1984 by 4pi(PC)beta-gamma coincidence
ionization chamber calibrated by 4pi(e,x)-gamma coincidence in 1983
4pi(LS)-gamma live-timed anti-coincidence confirmed by ionization chamber and gamma spectrometry
ionization chamber calibrated by primary method
